title: Roxycraft
description: Kitchen sink modpack with a few tech mods and no real config changes
body:
## About

This is a pretty generic kitchen sink pack thrown together for me and my friends to play on a private server, the bulk of the content mods include different technology mods (thermal expansion, mekanism, gregtech, ae2, integrated dynamics, forestry, tinkers construct, projectred), a couple mob mods (fossils and archaeology revival, betteranimalsplus), a new dimension (the betweenlands), and a worldgen mod (Biome Bundle + OTG). 

There is no major config changes beyond simple things like disabling duplicate ores from spawning, though it should be noted that justenoughdimensions is used to create a separate overworld dimension where only gregtech ores spawn, since that mod overhauls oregen and not everyone wanted to play with it. 

While this was made for private use by some friends, there's nothing stopping it from being used on a server or a singleplayer world, no special setup is required.

## Attributions

This modpack features [/dank/null](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dank-null), [AE2 Unofficial Extended Life](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ae2-extended-life), [Artifacts](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/artifacts), [Aqua Acrobatics](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aqua-acrobatics), [Aquaculture](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aquaculture), [Baubles](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/baubles), [The Betweenlands](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/angry-pixel-the-betweenlands-mod), [Building Gadgets](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/building-gadgets), [CensoredASM](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lolasm), [Chisels & Bits](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/chisels-bits), [Collective](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/collective), [Cosmetic Armor Reworked](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-reworked), [Cycle Paintings](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cycle-paintings), [Electroblob's Wizardry](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/electroblobs-wizardry), [Gendustry](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gendustry), [Glassential](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/glassential), [Macaw's Fences and Walls](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-fences-and-walls), [Mod Name Tooltip](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mod-name-tooltip), [Naughthirium](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/naughthirium), [Nomadic Tents](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/nomadic-tents), [Nothirium](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/nothirium), [p445w0rd's Library](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/p455w0rds-library), [Project Red Base](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/project-red-core), [Project Red Fabrication](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/project-red-fabrication), [Project Red Integration](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/project-red-integration), [Project Red Illumination](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/project-red-illumination), [Railcraft](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/railcraft), [ReAuth](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/reauth), [RenderLib](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/renderlib), [Super Sound Muffler: Revived](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/super-sound-muffler-revived), [Torchmaster](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/torchmaster), and [Unlimited Chisel Works](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/unlimited-chisel-works). More information about those mods can be found at the links provided.
